question: The line chart shows revenue from 1924 to 2024. Which statement best describes a limitation when interpreting this chart?

options.A: The chart is too small to clearly distinguish exact revenue levels and small changes over time.
options.B: Revenue can be read precisely for every year despite the small size of the chart.
options.C: Revenue stayed exactly the same throughout the entire period.
options.D: Revenue clearly decreased in every decade shown.

explanation: Revenue declined from 1980 to 1990. The extremely small axis labels can make it hard to read which period had the decline.
